series_metadata.series_description: This records series includes On-site Review Files which contains the date of on-site reviews, conducted in schools and districts, draft and final review reports, correspondence regarding the review, and clearance letters.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain five (5) years after grant closure; provided the records have been audited by the Auditor of State and the audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved. ; Electronic: Retain five (5) years after grant closure; provided the records have been audited by the Auditor of State and the audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
